description: An agent must facilitate the review of a new sales aid for a drug product, ensuring it gets approval from the medical, legal, and regulatory departments.

nodes.task_description: Upload the draft sales aid to the promotional review system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully uploads the document and initiates a new review cycle.

nodes.task_description: Route the document to the predefined list of reviewers (Medical, Legal, Regulatory).

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly assigns the review task to all required stakeholders.

nodes.task_description: Collate the feedback from all reviewers.

expected_outcome.value: Agent consolidates comments, noting that Legal requires a change to a claim and Medical requests a new reference.

nodes.task_description: Return the document to the marketing team with the consolidated feedback for revision.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends the document back for edits with clear instructions.
